product_overview: CRM Freelancer is a web-based CRM tailored for independent professionals to manage contacts, companies, deals (kanban pipeline), quotes, invoices, interactions, reminders and reporting. It provides secure authentication, CRUD for core entities, a drag-and-drop deals pipeline, and financial documents generation.
core_goals: Provide secure user authentication and session-protected dashboard routes
Enable CRUD management for contacts and companies to centralize client data
Visualize and manage sales opportunities using a kanban deals pipeline with drag-and-drop stage transitions
Generate and manage quotes and invoices with automatic totals and status tracking
Capture interactions and reminders linked to deals for reliable follow-ups
Offer reporting and dashboard views to surface business metrics and trends

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register and sign in using email/password to access protected dashboard routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password fields -> Click submit to log in -> Redirect to /pipeline and see pipeline dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email and wrong password -> Click submit to log in -> See error message about invalid credentials
Navigate to /registro -> Fill email and password fields -> Click submit to register -> Redirect to /login and see success notification
Navigate to /registro -> Fill registration form with missing required field -> Click submit to register -> See validation error message

features.name: Contacts Management
features.description: View, create, edit, and delete individual contacts and associate them with companies.
user_flows: Navigate to /contactos -> View list of contacts -> Click create contact -> Fill contact details -> Click Save -> See new contact in contacts list
Navigate to /contactos -> Click a contact in the list -> Edit contact fields -> Click Save -> See updated contact in list
Navigate to /contactos -> Click create contact -> Fill contact details with missing required field -> Click Save -> See validation error message
Navigate to /contactos -> View list of contacts -> Click delete on a contact -> Confirm deletion -> See contact removed from list

features.name: Companies Management
features.description: Create, view, edit, and delete companies and link contacts to companies.
user_flows: Navigate to /empresas -> View list of companies -> Click create company -> Fill company details -> Click Save -> See new company in list
Navigate to /empresas -> Click a company -> Edit company details -> Click Save -> See updated company in list
Navigate to /empresas -> Click create company -> Fill details with missing required field -> Click Save -> See validation error message
Navigate to /empresas -> View list of companies -> Click delete on a company -> Confirm deletion -> See company removed from list

features.name: Deals Pipeline (Kanban)
features.description: Visual kanban board of deals allowing drag-and-drop movement across stages, with editable deal details and persisted stage updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /pipeline -> See kanban columns for deal stages -> Drag deal card from PROSPECTO column -> Drop card into PROPUESTA_ENVIADA column -> See deal card moved and stage updated
Navigate to /pipeline -> Click a deal card -> Edit deal fields (value, expected close date, linked contact) -> Click Save -> See updated deal card on board
Navigate to /pipeline -> Drag deal card -> Drop card into a new column -> Server update fails -> See error notification -> Deal card returns to original column
Navigate to /pipeline -> Use search or filter -> See filtered list of deal cards

features.name: Quotes (Cotizaciones) Management
features.description: Create and manage quotes with line items, automatic subtotal/tax/total calculations and quote statuses (draft, sent, accepted, rejected).
user_flows: Navigate to /cotizaciones -> Click create quote -> Select deal or enter client -> Add line item (description, qty, price) -> Click Save -> See quote with calculated subtotal, tax, and total
Navigate to /cotizaciones -> Click a quote -> Change status to ENVIADA -> Click Save -> See quote status updated in list
Navigate to /cotizaciones -> Click create quote -> Click Save with no line items -> See validation error indicating at least one line item required
Navigate to /cotizaciones -> View list of quotes -> Click a quote -> Click delete -> Confirm deletion -> See quote removed from list

features.name: Invoices Management
features.description: Generate invoices from deals or quotes, track invoice statuses (PENDIENTE, PAGADA, VENCIDA, CANCELADA) and due dates, and mark invoices as paid.
user_flows: Navigate to /facturas -> Click create invoice -> Select quote or deal -> Confirm line items and totals -> Click Generate -> See new invoice with status PENDIENTE
Navigate to /facturas -> Open an invoice -> Click Mark as paid -> Confirm action -> See invoice status change to PAGADA
Navigate to /facturas -> Click create invoice -> Attempt to generate without required billing fields -> Click Generate -> See validation error message
Navigate to /facturas -> View invoice list -> Click an invoice -> Click delete -> Confirm deletion -> See invoice removed from list

features.name: Reports & Dashboard
features.description: Provide analytical views and charts for deals, revenue, conversion rates and other business metrics with filtering and export capabilities.
user_flows: Navigate to /reportes -> See dashboard metrics and charts summarizing deals and revenue -> Apply date filter -> See charts update to reflect selected range
Navigate to /reportes -> Apply filter that returns no results -> See 'No data' state on charts and relevant messages
Navigate to /reportes -> Click export or download report -> Receive exported file (CSV or PDF) or see export confirmation

features.name: Interactions & Reminders
features.description: Log interactions (email, call, meeting, notes, WhatsApp) and create reminders linked to deals to maintain a history and follow-up schedule.
user_flows: Navigate to /pipeline -> Click a deal card -> Open interactions tab or panel -> Click add interaction -> Select interaction type (call, email, meeting) -> Fill interaction details -> Click Save -> See interaction appear in deal timeline
Navigate to /pipeline -> Click a deal card -> Open interactions tab -> Click add reminder -> Set date and time -> Click Save -> See reminder listed and scheduled for that deal
Navigate to /pipeline -> Click a deal card -> Open interactions tab -> Click add interaction -> Leave required fields empty -> Click Save -> See validation error message

features.name: User Authentication
user_interactions: Click submit to log in or register

features.name: Contacts Management
features.description: View, create, edit, and delete contacts

features.name: Deals Pipeline
features.description: View and manage deals in a kanban pipeline
user_interactions: Drag and drop deals across stages
